title: Sealapack SAP1069, 3PC LARGE BAG CLIPS - KITCHEN STORAGE FOOD FRESH FREEZER FRIDGE PLASTIC SEAL NEW, Clear, 18.0 cm*12.5 cm*2.5 cm
features: CLIP TO SAVE: Sealapack Easy Grip Storage Clips, brightly coloured, easy to use in the home, office or garage. Securely seal open packs of cereal,bread, fruit, pulses, pasta - anything in a packet !
FRESHER 4 LONGER: Create a tight seal to keep open food and ingredient packets secure and air tight to keep moisture and air out, leaving the contents fresher 4 longer!
EASY TO USE: Quickly need to seal an open bag? These bright clips are easy to store and find in a kitchen drawer for a fast clip and seal solution
FREEZER SAFE: Perfect to seal open bags of frozen venetables, herbs, smoothie fruit mixes and open packets of bread
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 3 MULTI-COLOUR CLIPS
description: Sealapack Easy Grip Storage Clips, brightly coloured, large, easy to use in the home, office or garage. Securely seal open packs of cereal,bread, fruit, pulses, pasta. Create a tight seal to keep open food and ingredient packets secure and air tight to keep moisture and air out, leaving the contents fresher 4 longer! Quickly need to seal an open bag? These bright clips are easy to store and find in a kitchen drawer for a fast clip and seal solution. Pack of 6 multi-colour clips
